name: Grandma's Apple Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix dry ingredients.
2. Add eggs and oil; mix well but do not overbeat.
3. Fold in apples and nuts.
4. Pour batter into an ungreased tube pan or sheet cake pan.
5. Bake at 350 degrees for 1 to 1 1/4 hours, until done.
6. Cool completely.
7. Dust with confectioners' sugar before serving.
